<!--
Thank you for taking the time to file a bug report.

BEFORE SUBMITTING, please check:
  1. https://github.com/asad/bime-dist/issues (open + closed) — your bug may
     already be reported or fixed.
  2. The live demo at https://asad.github.io/bime-dist/workbench.html
     to confirm the bug still reproduces against the latest published
     version.
  3. The browser console (F12 / Cmd-Opt-I) for error messages.

The more reproducible your report, the faster we can fix it.
-->

- **Operating system:** <!-- e.g. macOS 14.5, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- **Touch device or desktop:** <!-- desktop / iPad / Android tablet / phone -->

## Screenshot / screen recording

<!-- Drag-drop an image into this box, or link to a recording. Optional but very helpful for UX bugs. -->

## Severity

<!-- Mark with [x]. -->

- [ ] Crashes / data loss — BIME becomes unusable
- [ ] Wrong chemistry — incorrect SMILES, valence, stereo, or aromaticity
- [ ] UI/UX — works but is hard to use
- [ ] Cosmetic — visual glitch, no functional impact

## Anything else
